main.description: Set or remove the main account password for any account (admin only). Enables login via the PDS account page without WID. Revokes all existing refresh tokens.

did.description: DID of the account whose main password should be set

password.description: New main account password (min 8, max 256 characters). Omit when removePassword is true.

removePassword.description: When true, removes the main password (sets it to null), reverting to WID-only auth
